title: 有馬記念の後に・極上のいいこいいこ

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, pant... Ya beat me!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
She's so tough! There's no way I can match that
resolve...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The fateful battle has been decided! The winner
of this year's Arima Kinen is... Super Creek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We did it, Trainer! I'm a Grand Prix winner! And
that means...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You're a Grand Prix trainer!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I should be the one thanking you! I... I just...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, come and join me in the winner's circle!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hello, everyone. I'm Super Creek, the former
villain. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, I'm actually just a motherly
Umamusume who wants to coddle her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for your support today!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: You can coddle me anytime!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're all very important to me, so I want
you all to listen to what I have to say!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Please be careful on your way home. The Arima
Kinen isn't over until you're back safe!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Okaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A unified response. Super Creek appears to have
captured everyone's hearts.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Right, I'd like to finish off with some special
congratulations.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now that my trainer has become number one in
the world, I'd like to offer a reward as a way of
expressing my gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She pulls me out to stand in front of everyone.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You've really become so capable, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And it's thanks to you that I've been able to
achieve such wonderful results over these past
three years.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But my career is hardly about results.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's about you and me, and everything we've built
together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We both try to hold back our tears.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You've done such a great job. Okay, here I go...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Who's a good trainer?! You are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I close my eyes and soak it in. There's nothing like
getting praised and patted when you're on top of
the world.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a moment, I have no idea what's happening.
My body is enveloped in a strange sensation...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And I soon find myself wrapped in Super Creek's
warm embrace.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Thank you so, so much.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for coming into my life. I'm so glad to
have met you... You are my everything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My body trembles with emotion as I continue to
look up towards the sky, unable to even hug her
back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm finally a first-class trainer. The sky should feel
distant and unreachable...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet now, as Super Creek holds me up in her tight
embrace, it feels so very close.
